zh.Saint-Jean-d'Acre, Acre, Kingdom of Jeru: دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهولاية بيروت阿卡阿可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem於1166年7月29日出生在法國哈帕格時，他的父親Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne38歲，母親Marie de France21歲。他於大約1186年與Ermenson de Namur在法國結婚。他於1190年登記服兵役。他去世於1197年9月10日在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهولاية بيروت阿卡阿可享年31歲，埋葬在巴西阿可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem于1166年7月29日出生在法国哈帕格时，他的父亲Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne38岁，母亲Marie de France21岁。他于大约1186年与Ermenson de Namur在法国结婚。他于1190年登记服兵役。他去世于1197年9月10日在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهولاية بيروت阿卡阿可享年31岁，埋葬在巴西阿可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Champagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Armand, Marcel, Lucien, Cecile, Emile, Normand, Pierre, Alain, Antoine, Evens, Fernand.

French: habitational name from Champagne, a historical province in the northeast of France, named in Latin as Campania (from campus ‘plain, flat land’). This is also the name of various villages in France, and in some cases the surname may derive from one of these. This surname is also found in Haiti (see also 2 below). Compare Champaign , Champaigne , Champine , and Shampine .
Haitian: from Champagne (see 1 above), used as a nickname or personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem was born on 29 July 1166, in Champagne, France, his father, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, was 38 and his mother, Marie de France, was 21. He married Ermenson de Namur about 1186, in France. He registered for military service in 1190. He died on 10 September 1197, in Acre, Akka, Beirut, Ottoman Empire, at the age of 31, and was buried in Acre, Brazil.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem est né le 29 juillet 1166, à Champagne, France, son père, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Marie de France, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Ermenson de Namur environ 1186, à France. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1190. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1197, à Acre, Akka, Beirut, Empire ottoman, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Acre, Brésil.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem am 29. Juli 1166 in Champagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne 38 und seine Mutter Marie de France 21. Er hat um 1186 in Frankreich Ermenson de Namur geheiratet. Er hat sich 1190 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 10. September 1197 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Acre, Akka, Beirut, Osmanisches Reich und wurde in Acre, Brasilien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem è nato il il 29 luglio 1166 nel Champagne, Francia, il suo padre, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Marie de France, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Ermenson de Namur circa 1186, nel Francia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1190. Morì il 10 settembre 1197, nel Acre, Akka, Beirut, Impero ottomano, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Acre, Brasile.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalemが1166年7月29日にフランスチャンプアグンで生まれた時，父Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagneは38歳，母Marie de Franceは21歳であった。約1186年にフランスでErmenson de Namurと結婚した。彼は1190年に兵役登録をした。彼は1197年9月10日にオスマン帝国ولاية بيروتアッカアクアで31歳で死去し，ブラジルアクアにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint-Jean-d'Acre, Acre, Kingdom of Jeru: دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه ولاية بيروت 왁아 악르
ko.lifeSummary: Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem(이)가 1166년 7월 29일 프랑스 챔파그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de France(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1186년 프랑스에서 Ermenson de Namur(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1190년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1197년 9월 10일 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه ولاية بيروت 왁아 악르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 브라질 악르에 묻혔다.

pt.29 July 1166–10 September 1197: 29 de julho de 1166–10 de setembro de 1197
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem nasceu em 29 de julho de 1166, em Champagne, França, seu pai, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Marie de France, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermenson de Namur aproximadamente 1186, em França. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1190. Ele faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1197, em Acre, Akka, Beirut, Império Otomano, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Acre, Brasil.

ru.Jerusalem, Royaume Franc de Terre Sainte: джирсеилем, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина
ru.Saint-Jean-d'Acre, Acre, Kingdom of Jeru: акр, акка, ولاية بيروت, Османская империя
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem родился 29 июля 1166 г. в местности чампагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de France, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermenson de Namur около 1186 г. в местности Франция. В 1190 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 10 сентября 1197 г. в местности акр, акка, ولاية بيروت, Османская империя в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности акр, Бразилия.

es.29 July 1166–10 September 1197: 29 de julio de 1166–10 de septiembre de 1197
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri II de Champagne Roi de Jérusalem nació el 29 de julio de 1166, en Champagne, Francia, su papá, Henri Ier dit 'le Libéral' comte de Champagne, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Marie de France, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ermenson de Namur aproximadamente 1186, en Francia. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1190. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1197, en Acre, Akka, Beirut, Imperio otomano, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Acre, Brasil.
